shapes.frame_eqs_str: a['ang']=(Math.sin(a['time'])*6); a['var']=(0.12-(above(a['bass'], 0.8)*0.2)); a['x']=((Math.sin(a['time'])*a['var'])+0.5); a['y']=((Math.cos(a['time'])*a['var'])+0.5); a['g']=(Math.sin(div(a['time'],4))*0.3); a['r']=(Math.cos(div(a['time'],2))*0.4); a['b']=(Math.sin(div(a['time'],3))*0.2); a['g2']=(Math.cos(div(a['time'],3))*0.3); a['r2']=(Math.sin(div(a['time'],2))*0.4); a['b2']=(Math.cos(div(a['time'],4))*0.2);

init_eqs_str: a['xtc'] = 0; a['speed'] = 0; a['acid'] = 0; a['morphine'] = 0; a['dmt'] = 0; a['saliva'] = 0; a['mv_x']=64; a['mv_y']=48; a['nut']=0; a['stp']=0; a['stq']=0; a['rtp']=0; a['rtq']=0; a['wvr']=0; a['decay']=0; a['dcsp']=0;
pixel_eqs_str: a['xtc']=(Math.sin((a['time']*0.3))*10); a['speed']=(40-(above(a['bass'], 0.9)*15)); a['speed']=(a['speed']+a['xtc']); a['acid']=(a['x']*Math.sin(a['time'])); a['morphine']=(a['y']*Math.cos(a['time'])); a['dmt']=(above(div(((a['treb']*a['treb'])*a['treb']),3), 2.5)*2); a['saliva']=(above(a['treb'], 0.9)*2); a['cx']=(((a['morphine']*a['dmt'])*a['rad'])*0.3); a['cy']=(((a['acid']*a['saliva'])*a['rad'])*0.3); a['dx']=(Math.sin((a['y']*a['speed']))*0.01); a['dy']=(Math.cos((a['x']*a['speed']))*0.01); a['dx']=(a['dx']+0.006); a['dy']=(a['dy']+0.006);
